task: Rotate the silver stand on the right.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A silver stand with multiple cylindrical containers is on a dark countertop. The stand has a central base and several upright cylinders. The task is to rotate the stand, which requires grasping the base and applying a rotational force. STRATEGY - First, reach and grasp the base of the stand to ensure stability. Then, apply a rotational force around the vertical axis. Failure modes include losing grip on the base or rotating the stand too quickly, causing it to tip. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1: Reach the base of the stand. Step 2: Grasp the base firmly to prevent slipping. Step 3: Apply a rotational force to rotate the stand.**
Goal: rotated(silver_stand)
Scene: silver_stand, countertop
Step 1: reach(silver_stand)
  affordance_region: the base of the silver stand
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, silver_stand, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, silver_stand) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(silver_stand)
  affordance_region: the base of the silver stand
  contact: holding(silver_stand) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(silver_stand)
Step 3: rotate(silver_stand)
  affordance_region: the base of the silver stand
  contact: holding(silver_stand) [progress]
  spatial: angle(gripper, silver_stand, 0, 360) [progress]
  direction: rotate_axis(0, 0, 1) [progress]
  safety: no_tipping(silver_stand)
  done_when: angle(gripper, silver_stand) > 360
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the base of the silver stand
the base of the silver stand
the base of the silver stand
